
Here I am uploading three of my favourite code snippets those I have tried my level best to polish. Full reproducible workflows are available on GitHub repositories.

Here are three reproducible code samples from my research projects.

- 📄 [R Code Sample](Code_Sample_R.pdf)
- 📄 [Python Code Sample](Code_Sample_Python.pdf)
- 📄 [STATA Code Sample](code_sample_STATA.pdf)
